title: Midnight Uruguayan Apricot Jam Toast
description: A flexitarian-friendly Uruguayan dish featuring apricot jam on toast, perfect for midnight cravings. This recipe combines the sweetness of apricot jam with the crunch of toasted bread.
instructions: Preheat the toaster or toaster oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Butter each slice of bread on one side.
Place the bread slices, butter side up, on a baking sheet.
Toast the bread in the oven for 5 minutes or until lightly browned.
Spread 2 tablespoons of apricot jam on each toasted bread slice.
Sprinkle chopped parsley and a pinch of salt over the jam.
Serve the apricot jam toast immediately and enjoy.
Consider pairing with a warm beverage, such as tea or coffee.
